debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace α
μ ν : ComplexMeasure α
f : α → ℂ
⊢ ∫ (x : α),
      @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ (μ + ν) x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ (μ + ν) =
    ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ μ x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ μ +
      ∫ (x : α), @MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.ang α inst✝ ν x * f x ∂@MeasureTheory.ComplexMeasure.var α inst✝ ν

failed_attempts:
change VectorMeasure.integral (μ + ν) f = VectorMeasure.integral μ f + VectorMeasure.integral ν f
  let ρ := μ.var + ν.var
  have hμ : μ.var ≪ ρ := Measure.absolutelyContinuous_of_le (Measure.le_add_right le_rfl)
  have hν : ν.var ≪ ρ := Measure.absolutelyContinuous_of_le (Measure.le_add_left le_rfl)
  have hadd : (μ + ν).var ≪ ρ := (VectorMeasure.variation_add_le _ _).trans_ac (Measure.absolutelyContinuous_of_le le_rfl)
  rw [VectorMeasure.integral_eq_of_absolutelyContinuous hμ, VectorMeasure.integral_eq_of_absolutelyContinuous hν,
      VectorMeasure.integral_eq_of_absolutelyContinuous hadd]
  rw [← integral_add]
  · apply integral_congr_ae
    filter_upwards [VectorMeasure.rnDeriv_add μ ν ρ] with x hx
    simp only [hx, add_mul]
  · rwa [← VectorMeasure.integrable_iff_integrable_rnDeriv hμ]
  · rwa [← VectorMeasure.integrable_iff_integrable_rnDeriv hν]
